mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcements a
AND a.status = #{status}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.position, a.target_audience AS targetAudience, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.status, a.view_count AS viewCount, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM announcements a WHERE a.status = 1 AND (a.start_time IS NULL OR a.start_time <= NOW()) AND (a.end_time IS NULL OR a.end_time >= NOW())
AND (a.position = #{position} OR a.position = 'global')
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcements (title, content, position, target_audience, start_time, end_time, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{position}, #{targetAudience}, #{startTime} NULL, #{endTime} NULL, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE announcements SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, position = #{position}, target_audience = #{targetAudience}, start_time = #{startTime}NULL, end_time = #{endTime}NULL, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcements SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
